Jabari Walker earned a promotion from a two-way contract to a standard deal, but could not lock down a permanent rotation role.

How can Walker get to that point? How can he raise his ceiling?

items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 30, 1991: The Lakers' Magic Johnson finishes with 25 PTS/11 REB/8 AST in a 91-90 series-clinching win over Portland in Game 6 of the Western Conference Finals.

Terry Porter scored 24 PTS to lead the Blazers. Los Angeles advanced to face the Chicago Bulls in the NBA Finals.
